title: linaria alpina var. odoratissima
intro: Linaria alpina var. odoratissima, also known as Alpine Toadflax, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting respiratory health. Alpine Toadflax is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used in herbal blends or smoked for its medicinal properties.
